name: Onion Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice onions into thin wedges and sauté in margarine until brown, about 12 minutes.
2. Transfer to a bowl of food processor and chop slightly.
3. Stir in remaining ingredients and mix well.
I served this hot over thinly sliced broiled flank steak, alongside corn on the cob and a salad. The flavor combinations were interesting, but I think I'm going to decrease the amount of sugar next time, since the vinegar was so sweet on its own.
